items.title: Florida lawmakers debate PIP law amendment
items.snippet: Florida PIP law amendment proposes changes to insurance regulations covering car accident victims.

items.title: PIP law lawsuit filed against MD Now
items.snippet: Florida PIP law lawsuit alleges insurance fraud at MD Now urgent care clinics.

items.title: Urgent care scam targets accident victims in Florida
items.snippet: Florida attorney general warns of urgent care scam preying on car accident victims.

items.title: Florida PIP law amendment heads to governor
items.snippet: Florida PIP law amendment sent to governor for signature; insurance industry reacts.
